steps.title: Add the five values
steps.content: Sum the masses: $3620,3620,3240,3680,3340$, giving a total of $17500$.

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content: The mean is $$\tfrac{17500}{5}=3500.$$ The answer is 3500.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $3500$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $3500$.
